violations.text: Sausages were observed held at 106 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC reheated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2025

Deli meat (ham), eggs, cheese, chicken salad were observed held between 47-71 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC disposed of ham and other items were placed in cooler unit for active cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2025
The ceiling in the back prep area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2025
Outside dumpster area observed with furniture, wood pallets, and other debris. Refuse areas must be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean,. New Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2024
